title: Lambdas should be avoided
description: Lambdas should not be usedAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smellsince-c++11Why is this an issue?Lambdas are a concise way of creating anonymous functions - when those functions are themselves concise. However, the use of lambdas for sizable functions can make the code difficult to read. More importantly, following variable capture in lambdas can be difficult, potentially leading to dangling pointers.
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

checks.message: Lambda expressions should be avoided in this codebase
